name: Boustead Projects Limited
summary: Boustead Projects Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides real estate solutions for multinational corporations and local enterprises in Singapore, Malaysia, China, and Vietnam. The company operates in Design-and-Build, Real Estate, and Investment segments. It designs, builds, and develops industrial facilities and parks for lease or sale for aerospace and automotive, business park, food, healthcare and pharmaceutical, high-tech manufacturing, infocommunications, lifestyle, logistics, oil and gas, precision engineering, research and development, technology, and waste management industries. The company also develops and leases a leasehold portfolio primarily consists of single-tenanted custom-built business parks; and offers asset and facilities management services. In addition, it offers property fund management; property management; real estate trading; project management; and other property-related services, as well as acts as a private business trust and trustee for real estate trust. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Singapore. Boustead Projects Limited is a subsidiary of Boustead Singapore Limited.
